name: Gem Recruiting Benchmarks Report
desc: The definitive annual benchmark. 165M applicants, 15M candidates, 1.2M hires analyzed. Source of hire breakdown, funnel passthrough rates, recruiter productivity. 2026 edition available.

name: GRID Talent Trends Report (2026)
desc: Annual staffing industry research. AI adoption, candidate behavior, firm performance benchmarks. Published by Bullhorn.

name: HR.com Future of Talent Acquisition 2025
desc: AI adoption in TA, hiring strategy transformation, operational priorities.

name: iHire State of Online Recruiting
desc: AI adoption in recruiting jumped 428% between 2023-2025. Annual benchmarks on recruiter behavior and candidate job search patterns.

name: LinkedIn Future of Recruiting
desc: Annual report on recruiter trends, AI adoption, and skills-based hiring shifts.

name: ManpowerGroup Talent Shortage Survey (2026)
desc: 72% of employers worldwide can't find the talent they need. 39,000+ employers across 41 countries. Essential demand signal for any sourcing strategy.

name: SHRM Talent Trends Report
desc: Annual survey on recruiting challenges, AI adoption rates, and HR priorities.

name: Aptitude Research: Demystifying Talent Intelligence (2023)
desc: 72% of companies increasing TI investment. Skills-based approach, vendor landscape, business impact.

name: Aptitude Research: State of Sourcing (2023)
desc: 75% of companies are not satisfied with their sourcing approach. AI adoption, sourcing tech landscape, ROI measurement. By Madeline Laurano.

name: Aptitude Research: TA Systems Index (2021)
desc: ATS vendor profiles, top 10 TA tech trends, key drivers. Full competitive landscape snapshot.

name: Aspect43 TA Market Landscape (2025)
desc: In-depth analysis of the evolving TA tech landscape. Vendor categories, adoption patterns.

name: ATAP Sourcing Metrics Standard
desc: ATAP's sourcing metrics framework. Sourcing workflow, KPI definitions, measurement standards.

name: CEB: How to Measure Sourcing Effectiveness
desc: Metrics for demonstrating business value and measuring individual and team performance. Available via Gartner for HR subscription.

name: Lightcast: Talent Intelligence (2024)
desc: Internal + external data intersection. Skills taxonomy, job posting analytics, workforce planning framework.

name: Sourcing Metrics Whitepaper — Balazs Paroczay (2023)
desc: Cracking the code on sourcing metrics. By Balazs Paroczay and Alexandra Gyetvai. Source Code Agency.

name: 2024: What Sets CandE Award Winners Apart
desc: Contentment down, resentment up. What separates award-winning candidate experience from the rest.

name: CandE Benchmark Research (Survale)
desc: Annual candidate experience research. North America + Global editions. NPS, perception gaps, business impact.

name: The 2024 Business Impact of Candidate Experience
desc: ROI of candidate experience investment. Post-pandemic volatility, relationship quality, global benchmarks.

name: Avature Drip Campaigns Playbook
desc: 5 types of drip campaigns for recruiting. CRM nurture, passive candidate sequencing, buy-in framework.

name: Greenhouse: How to Build a Talent Operation
desc: Recruiting funnel, hiring manager partnership, structured process. The strategic recruiter playbook.

name: Karat 2025-2026 AI Workforce Transformation Report
desc: Engineering interview trends. How AI is changing technical skill assessment. Data from 400+ engineering leaders.

name: McKinsey: Beyond the Hype — AI in TMT (2024)
desc: AI and gen AI in tech, media, telecom. Essential context for tech talent sourcing.

name: Phenom Essential TA Toolkit
desc: Candidate persona canvas, journey map, 7 email templates for recruiters.

name: RAISE: Direct Sourcing Playbook
desc: Employer brand-led sourcing, talent pool curation, self-sourcing vs managed direct sourcing.

name: Standard Recruiting Analytics Package
desc: Five standard reports + three scorecards. 20-point report card framework for corporate recruiting programs.

name: Talent Leader's Guide to Reporting
desc: Mastering recruitment metrics. Analytics, reporting, TA team performance measurement.

name: WorkTech Global Market Briefing (2025)
desc: $3.55B in HR tech deals in H1 2025. Agentic AI, payroll, and recruitment platforms identified as hot investment categories. By George LaRoque.

name: Digitizing Talent
desc: Jessica Miller-Merrell — Creative strategies for the digital recruiting age. By the founder of Workology.

name: Evergreen Talent
desc: Roberta Chinsky Matuson — A guide to hiring and cultivating a sustainable workforce.

name: Evidence-Based Recruiting
desc: Atta Tarki — Systematic and repeatable hiring practices based on data, not gut instinct.

name: Fire Your Hiring Habits
desc: John Mitchell — Innovating the ways you hire, develop, and retain talent in the modern workforce.

name: Full Stack Recruiter: New Secrets Revealed
desc: Jan Tegze — Sequel with hidden tactics for top recruiters and sourcers.

name: Full Stack Recruiter: The Modern Recruiter's Guide
desc: Jan Tegze — The bible. Covers sourcing, boolean, tools, outreach, and the full recruiting lifecycle.

name: Hiring for Attitude
desc: Mark Murphy — Recruiting for attitude and cultural fit alongside skills. Includes assessment methodology.

name: Hiring for Diversity
desc: Arthur Woods & Susanna Tharakan — Building inclusive and equitable hiring practices. Practical guide with tools.

name: Hiring Greatness
desc: David E. Perry & Mark J. Haluska — How to recruit your dream team and outcompete for top talent.

name: Recruiting Sucks...But It Doesn't Have To
desc: Steve Lowisz — Breaking through the myths holding recruiting back.

name: Talent Magnet
desc: Mark Miller — How to attract and keep the best people.

name: The Holloway Guide to Technical Recruiting
desc: Holloway — Free comprehensive guide to hiring engineers. Deeply practical.

name: The Professional Recruiter's Handbook
desc: Jane Newell Brown & Ann Swain — Delivering excellence in recruitment practice. Classic UK-origin reference.

name: The Robot-Proof Recruiter (2nd ed.)
desc: Katrina Collier — Human-centered recruiting in an AI world. Updated edition with new AI chapter.

name: The Talent Fix Vol. 2
desc: Tim Sackett (2024) — SHRM guide to recruiting great talent. TA tech stack, high-volume hiring, recruiter leadership.

name: Who Is the New How
desc: Justin Palmer & Jessica Schertz — Strategies to find, recruit, and create the best teams.

name: Who: The A Method for Hiring
desc: Geoff Smart & Randy Street — Scorecard-based hiring methodology. The most widely used structured interviewing framework.

name: 300 Best Boolean Strings
desc: Irina Shamaeva — Boolean string bible.

name: 80 Sourcing Hacks
desc: The Recruitment Network — 80 practical sourcing hacks for recruiters. Quick-reference format.

name: AI Talent Sourcing
desc: Jonathan Kidder (2023) — 500+ ChatGPT prompts for recruiting tasks. Boolean, outreach, JDs, metrics, DEI.

name: Guide to Recruiting Military Veterans
desc: Jonathan Kidder — Boolean strings, communities, and tools to find and recruit veterans online.

name: High Tech and High Touch: Headhunting
desc: Coverdill & Finlay — Technology and economic transformation in headhunting and executive search.

name: Open Source Intelligence Techniques
desc: Michael Bazzell — The OSINT bible. Resources for searching and analyzing online information — updated annually.

name: People as Merchandise: Crack the Code to LinkedIn Recruitment
desc: Josef Kadlec — Deep LinkedIn sourcing methodology. By a SourceCon legend.

name: Power Searching the Internet: The Librarian's Quick Guide
desc: Nicole Hennig — Advanced web search techniques. Librarian methodology applied to sourcing.

name: Talk Tech to Me
desc: Brian Fink — The non-technical guide to technology recruiting. Understand what engineers actually build.

name: The Joy of Search
desc: Daniel M. Russell — Google insider's guide to going beyond the basics.

name: The Sourcer's Playbook
desc: Geoff Peterson — Visual guide for finding talent online. Sourcing strategies, platforms, workflows.

name: Top Talent Sourcing Tools for Recruiters
desc: Jonathan Kidder — Beginner's guide to 50+ sourcing tools. Platforms, extensions, boolean, OSINT — all covered.

name: AIRS AdvancedLab 2.0 Certification Course
desc: AIRS — The classic AIRS certification course content. Boolean, X-ray, sourcing methodology fundamentals.

name: AIRS: Discovering Candidate Contact Information
desc: AIRS — Finding contact info for candidates. AIRS methodology for contact research.

name: AI iQ for a Human-Focused Future
desc: Seth Dobrin — AI strategy, talent, and culture. Human-first AI implementation.

name: Artificial Intelligence for HR (2nd ed.)
desc: Ben Eubanks — Use AI to support and develop a successful workforce. Updated edition.

name: Data-Driven HR (2nd ed.)
desc: Bernard Marr — How to use AI, analytics, and data to drive HR performance.

name: Decoding Talent
desc: Eric Sydell — How AI and big data can solve your company's people puzzle.

name: Life 3.0: Being Human in the Age of AI
desc: Max Tegmark — The long view on AI's impact on society and work.

name: Talent Intelligence
desc: Toby Culshaw — Using business and people data to drive organizational performance. By one of the field's defining practitioners.

name: Weapons of Math Destruction
desc: Cathy O'Neil — How big data increases inequality. Critical counterbalance when evaluating AI hiring tools.

name: Quantifiably Better: HR Analytics
desc: Steve Vanwieren — Delivering HR analytics from start to finish. Practical framework for TA measurement.

name: Superforecasting
desc: Tetlock & Gardner — The art and science of prediction. Useful for structured hiring decisions and pipeline forecasting.

name: The HR Scorecard
desc: Becker, Huselid & Ulrich — Linking people, strategy, and performance. Classic HR measurement framework.

name: Agile People
desc: Pia-Maria Thoren — Radical HR approach that leads to motivated employees.

name: Good to Great
desc: Jim Collins — Why some companies make the leap and others don't. First Who, then What — talent is central.

name: People Strategy
desc: Jack Altman — How to invest in people and make culture your competitive advantage.

name: Scaling Up Excellence
desc: Sutton & Rao — Getting to more without settling for less. How to scale people and culture.

name: Superbosses
desc: Sydney Finkelstein — How exceptional leaders master the flow of talent in their organizations.

name: Talent Relationship Management
desc: Armin Trost — Competitive recruiting strategies in times of talent shortage.

name: The Death of Best Practices
desc: Susan P. Chen — Reimagining HR through cultivating a growth mindset.

name: Victory Through Organization
desc: Dave Ulrich et al. — Why the war for talent is failing and what to do about it.

name: Work Rules!
desc: Laszlo Bock — Insights from inside Google. The people ops bible — how data-driven hiring actually works.

name: Athena Rising: Why Men Should Mentor Women
desc: Johnson & Smith — Practical guide to cross-gender mentorship in the workplace.

name: Good Guys: Better Allies for Women in the Workplace
desc: Smith & Johnson — How men can be better allies for women in the workplace.

name: Indivisible
desc: Denise Hamilton — How to forge our differences into a stronger future.

name: Rebel Ideas: The Power of Diverse Thinking
desc: Matthew Syed — Cognitive diversity as competitive advantage. Evidence-based case for inclusive hiring.

name: The Culture Map
desc: Erin Meyer — Decoding how people think and work across cultures. Essential for global recruiting teams.

name: An Elegant Puzzle: Systems of Engineering Management
desc: Will Larson — Great context for anyone sourcing engineering leaders.

name: Grit: The Power of Passion and Perseverance
desc: Angela Duckworth — The science of success. Useful lens for evaluating candidates beyond credentials.

name: Never Split the Difference
desc: Chris Voss — FBI negotiation tactics applied to everyday life. Invaluable for offer negotiations.

name: No Hard Feelings
desc: Fosslien & West Duffy — The secret power of embracing emotions at work.

name: Radical Candor
desc: Kim Scott — Be a kickass boss without losing your humanity. Manager/leader essential.

name: Reset: How to Change What's Not Working
desc: Dan Heath — Framework for identifying and fixing broken systems. Useful for TA ops redesign.

name: The Manager's Path
desc: Camille Fournier — Guide for tech leaders navigating growth and change. Essential context for technical recruiting.

name: What Got You Here Won't Get You There
desc: Marshall Goldsmith — 20 workplace habits successful people need to break.

name: A Hacker's Mind
desc: Bruce Schneier — How the powerful bend society's rules. Systems thinking for sourcers.

name: Bad Blood
desc: John Carreyrou — Theranos story. Cautionary tale about culture, hiring, and leadership failure.

name: Employer Branding for Competitive Advantage
desc: Rana, Agarwal & Sharma — Models and implementation strategies for employer branding programs.

name: Fabless Semiconductor Manufacturing
desc: Chinmay K. Maiti — In the era of IoT. Context for anyone sourcing chip design and semiconductor talent.

name: Palo Alto: A History of California, Capitalism, and the World
desc: Malcolm Harris — Critical history of Silicon Valley. Useful context for tech talent markets.

name: Talk Tech to Me
desc: Brian Fink — The non-technical guide to technology recruiting. Understand what engineers actually do.

name: The Innovators
desc: Walter Isaacson — How hackers, geniuses, and geeks created the digital revolution. Context for tech recruiting.

name: AmazingHiring
desc: Chrome extension + platform for tech sourcing. Aggregates 50+ professional networks including GitHub, Stack Overflow, and patent databases.

name: Apollo.io
desc: Sales intelligence + contact database. 270M+ contacts, sequences. Strong for sourcing outside LinkedIn.

name: Covey Scout
desc: AI sourcing assistant you train in plain language. Describe how you'd evaluate a candidate; Scout builds and runs the bot. Inbound screening reviews thousands of profiles to surface top 5% within an hour.

name: Eightfold AI
desc: Talent intelligence platform. Skills-based matching, internal mobility, DEI sourcing signals. 2B+ talent profiles. Fortune 500 standard.

name: Fetcher
desc: AI identifies and scores candidates; a human curation team validates the shortlist before delivery. Hybrid model for teams that want automation without fully unreviewed AI output.

name: Findem
desc: Attribute-based talent search. Finds candidates keyword search misses. Strong diversity and career-signal enrichment.

name: Gem
desc: All-in-one recruiting platform: ATS + CRM + AI sourcing + analytics. AI sourcing agent searches 800M+ profiles with full candidate history context. Now publicly traded.

name: GoPerfect
desc: Autonomous AI sourcing. Scans 800M+ profiles, scores candidates, delivers shortlists. 60+ ATS integrations via Merge. Good for recurring role types at scale.

name: HeroHunt.ai
desc: AI recruiter that searches 1B+ profiles across LinkedIn, GitHub, and Stack Overflow, then runs autopilot outreach. RecruitGPT natural-language search + contextual screening.

name: hireEZ
desc: AI-powered outbound recruiting platform. Cross-platform candidate search, outreach sequences, Workday integration.

name: Hireflow
desc: Chrome extension sourcing + email drip campaigns + ATS sync. Treats recruiting like outbound sales.

name: Juicebox (PeopleGPT)
desc: Natural language candidate search. 800M+ profiles, relationship tracking, AI outreach, 50+ ATS integrations. Conversational search launched late 2025.

name: Kula
desc: Outbound recruiting platform. Sequences, referral automation, ATS sync. Built specifically for sourcing-led teams.

name: LinkedIn Hiring Assistant
desc: LinkedIn's first agentic AI product (launched Oct 2024, globally available 2025). Takes intake, builds qualified pipelines, reviews applicants, and answers candidate questions. Learns recruiter preferences over time.

name: LinkedIn Recruiter
desc: The industry standard. 1B+ profiles, InMail, advanced filters. Generative AI search enhancements launched 2025.

name: Loxo
desc: Talent intelligence OS. CRM + sourcing + outreach in one. Good for agency and in-house teams.

name: Mercor
desc: AI-powered hiring marketplace. Candidates complete an AI interview once; high scorers receive automated Instant Offers across future roles. Strong for sourcing pre-vetted global technical talent.

name: Moonhub
desc: AI sourcing via natural language. Surfaces candidates keyword search misses across public web data. Founded by Nancy Xu.

name: Pin
desc: Full-stack AI recruiting: sourcing, outreach, screening, scheduling in one. 850M+ profiles, 48% avg reply rate, transparent pricing from $100/mo with a free tier. Strong for teams that want to replace 5 tools with one.

name: SeekOut
desc: Enterprise talent intelligence. Strong diversity filters, GitHub/patent enrichment, large database. Unmatched for DEI and hard-to-fill technical roles.

name: Tezi (Max)
desc: Autonomous AI recruiter. "Max" runs end-to-end — sourcing, screening, and scheduling — as a hands-off agent. For teams that want to delegate full req ownership to AI.

name: Turing
desc: Pre-vetted remote engineers matched via AI. 3M+ global developers on talent cloud, AI vetting across 100+ tech skills. Two-week risk-free trial. Good for building remote engineering teams quickly.

name: ZoomInfo Talent
desc: B2B data + recruiting. Company org charts, direct dials, intent signals. Best combined with another sourcing platform.

name: 40 Custom Search Engines by Irina Shamaeva
desc: Curated custom search engines for sourcing.

name: Balazs Boolean Builder
desc: Boolean builder for free LinkedIn. By Balazs Paroczay.

name: BooleanStrings Bank
desc: String directory maintained by sourcing community.

name: CSE Utopia
desc: Amazing list of public CSEs by Dean Da Costa.

name: Free People Search Tool
desc: Search candidates across LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter, Dribbble.

name: Grep.app
desc: Search across all public GitHub repos by code. Find developers by what they build.

name: I Search From
desc: Simulate Google search from a different location and device.

name: Intelligence X
desc: OSINT search engine. Indexes dark web, leaked data, public archives.

name: RecruitEm
desc: Free Google X-ray search generator. Build boolean strings for LinkedIn, X, GitHub, Stack Overflow, and XING — paste a JD and let AI build the search.

name: SourceGraph
desc: Universal code search across GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket.

name: Sourcing Games
desc: Gamified sourcing challenges to sharpen OSINT and boolean skills.

name: Wayback Machine
desc: Find old versions of profiles, company pages, removed content.

name: Answer The Public
desc: Surface questions people search — useful for JD keywords and EVP research.

name: Followerwonk
desc: Twitter/X bio search. Find people by keywords in bios.

name: Searchmybio
desc: Search Instagram user bios.

name: Social Searcher
desc: Free social media search across platforms.

name: WhoPostedWhat
desc: Date-based Facebook post search. By Henk van Ess.

name: LinkedIn Sales Nav Email Lookup
desc: Replace the end of the URL with any email to find a connected LinkedIn profile.

name: OctoHR
desc: GitHub Chrome extension showing recruiter-friendly profile details.

name: Profile Summary for GitHub
desc: Visual summary of any GitHub profile.

name: Anymail Finder
desc: Verified email finder. Only charges for verified results.

name: Apollo.io
desc: 270M+ contacts, email sequences, enrichment.

name: Clay
desc: Data enrichment + workflow automation. Pulls from 50+ sources.

name: Clearbit
desc: B2B data enrichment. Company + person data via API. Now part of HubSpot — free tier via HubSpot.

name: ContactOut
desc: Email + phone finder. Strong LinkedIn coverage.

name: Datagma
desc: GDPR-compliant email + phone finder. Strong European coverage. Pay-per-result model.

name: Hunter.io
desc: Domain-based email search and verification. Great free tier.

name: Kaspr
desc: LinkedIn email + phone finder. ~500M verified contacts, strong European coverage. Free plan with unlimited B2B email credits.

name: Lusha
desc: B2B contact data. Good direct dial coverage.

name: Nymeria
desc: Email finder with LinkedIn integration.

name: RocketReach
desc: Email and phone finder. Large database, API available.

name: SalesQL
desc: LinkedIn email + phone finder extension.

name: Signal Hire
desc: Email + phone finder with Chrome extension.

name: Swordfish AI
desc: Direct dials and mobile numbers. Strong phone coverage.

name: Wiza
desc: Verified emails + phone numbers from LinkedIn and Sales Navigator. Bulk export, real-time verification, job-change alerts. Free tier available.

name: Boomerang for Gmail
desc: Email scheduling and reminders.

name: Chatkick (formerly Trinsly)
desc: Talent CRM + personalized email automation for recruiters. Trinsly rebranded to Chatkick.

name: Dripify
desc: LinkedIn automation for sequences and drip campaigns.

name: Expandi
desc: Safe LinkedIn automation. Mimics human behavior.

name: GMass
desc: Mail-merge and cold email sequences right inside Gmail. Generous free tier for solo recruiters.

name: Instantly.ai
desc: Cold email at scale. Unlimited sending accounts, warm-up built in. Fast becoming the default for high-volume outreach.

name: Lemlist
desc: Personalized cold email with images and video. High deliverability focus.

name: MixMax
desc: Gmail enhancement. Sequences, scheduling, tracking, templates.

name: Smartlead
desc: Multi-channel cold outreach (email + LinkedIn). Strong deliverability infrastructure. Popular for sourcing-as-sales workflows.

name: SourceWhale
desc: Multi-step outreach across email, LinkedIn, SMS, WhatsApp, and phone. AI drafting, pipeline insights, 70+ ATS/CRM integrations. Built for recruiting teams.

name: Waalaxy
desc: LinkedIn + email outreach sequences. Great for sourcers.

name: Deepl Translator
desc: Best-in-class AI translation. Better than Google Translate.

name: Email Subject Line Tester
desc: Score and improve your subject lines.

name: Grammarly
desc: Grammar, tone, and clarity check. Essential writing tool.

name: Hemingway Editor
desc: Readability check. Paste any outreach message here first.

name: Mailinator
desc: Disposable email inboxes for one-time signups.

name: Temp-Mail
desc: Free throwaway email.

name: Draup
desc: AI-powered talent intelligence. Market mapping, skills data, competitor analysis, and location/workforce planning. Strong for strategic sourcing and workforce design.

name: Google Trends
desc: Search volume trends. Useful for role and skills demand signals.

name: Horsefly Analytics
desc: Labor market analytics. Real-time, localized supply/demand and cost insights for talent acquisition and location strategy.

name: Indeed Hiring Lab
desc: Indeed's economic research arm. Labor market data, job posting trends, and wage analysis. (Replaced Indeed's retired Job Trends tool.)

name: Layoffs.fyi
desc: Track tech layoffs in real time. Golden window sourcing.

name: Levels.fyi
desc: Crowdsourced compensation at tech companies. Extremely accurate.

name: Lightcast (EMSI Burning Glass)
desc: Labor market data. Job postings, skills demand, compensation.

name: LinkedIn Talent Insights
desc: Workforce analytics. Pool sizing, competitor mapping, skills trends.

name: Pave
desc: Real-time compensation benchmarking.

name: People Data Labs
desc: Person and company data via API. Raw building block for custom talent-mapping and enrichment workflows.

name: Progression.fyi
desc: Open source career frameworks from top tech companies.

name: Ravio
desc: European compensation data. Free if you contribute your data.

name: Revelio Labs
desc: Workforce intelligence from public employment data.

name: TalentNeuron
desc: Global talent intelligence. Real-time labor market data.

name: TechPays
desc: Open source European tech compensation.

name: U.S. Semiconductor Ecosystem Map (SIA)
desc: R&D, chip design, fabrication, and supplier locations across the US. Essential for semiconductor talent sourcing.

name: Ashby
desc: Modern ATS with strong analytics built in. One of the fastest-growing tools in TA ops — particularly popular with tech companies.

name: Greenhouse
desc: Structured hiring + ATS. Strong integrations ecosystem.

name: Lever
desc: ATS + CRM combined. Nurture + pipeline management. Part of Employ alongside JazzHR, Jobvite, and Pillar.

name: Manatal
desc: ATS + AI recommendations from $15/user/month. Good entry-level option for smaller or agency teams.

name: Pinpoint
desc: ATS + talent CRM with strong candidate experience and reporting. Popular with mid-market in-house teams.

name: Rippling
desc: HR + ATS + payroll + IT in one platform. Good for teams consolidating their HR stack.

name: SmartRecruiters (now SAP)
desc: AI-enabled ATS acquired by SAP (September 2025). High-volume recruiting, strong automation, good candidate experience. 4,000+ enterprise orgs. Will replace SuccessFactors Recruiting over 3-5 years.

name: Teamtailor
desc: ATS with strong employer branding and career site tools. Popular in EMEA.

name: Workable
desc: SMB-friendly ATS with built-in sourcing, AI recommendations, and video interviews.

name: Workday Recruiting
desc: Enterprise ATS. Widely used at large orgs.

name: Avature
desc: Enterprise CRM with heavy customization. Fortune 500 standard.

name: Beamery
desc: Talent CRM + lifecycle platform. AI-personalized outreach, career site, interview self-scheduling. Nurture passive pipelines at scale.

name: Gem
desc: All-in-one ATS + CRM + sourcing. Strong analytics. Now public.

name: Phenom
desc: Talent experience platform. CRM, career site, internal mobility, AI throughout.

name: Adaface JD Generator
desc: Free templates to easily create job descriptions for popular tech roles.

name: BeApplied
desc: JD text analysis for bias.

name: Datapeople
desc: Job description analytics and inclusive-writing guidance. Data-driven recommendations to reduce bias and widen candidate pools.

name: Gender Decoder
desc: Check JDs for gendered language.

name: Joblint
desc: Flag toxic, unrealistic, or discriminatory language in JDs.

name: Jobpage Grader
desc: Grade your job pages for candidate experience.

name: Ongig
desc: Job description software with a 10,000+ biased-word database, inclusive replacements, readability tips, and JD templates.

name: Textio
desc: Augmented writing for JDs. Predicts impact of language on candidate pools.

name: HeyMilo
desc: AI voice screening. Two-way conversational voice interviews that screen and rank candidates automatically. Good for phone-screen-heavy pipelines.

name: HireVue
desc: Video interviews + AI assessments. Enterprise scale. Masks PII during screening to reduce bias.

name: Humanly
desc: Conversational AI recruiter + talent CRM. Automates screening, scheduling, and structured interviews. Hires up to 8x faster for high-volume pipelines. Strong consent and data governance framework.

name: Paradox (Olivia)
desc: Conversational AI for high-volume hiring. Screens, schedules, and engages candidates via text/SMS/WhatsApp 24/7. Acquired by Workday (September 2025). Best for retail, hospitality, and logistics at scale.

name: Sapia.ai
desc: Text-based AI interviewing. Structured chat interviews that screen and rank candidates fairly at scale. Good for high-volume without the chatbot feel.

name: BrightHire
desc: Records, transcribes, and highlights every interview. Structured guides, shared feedback, AI screening interviews. Reduces reliance on interviewer memory. Integrates with major ATS and video platforms.

name: Grain
desc: Record, transcribe, and clip meeting highlights. Good for sharing interview moments with hiring managers.

name: Metaview
desc: AI interview notes. Auto-generates structured summaries in the background — no behavior change needed.

name: Otter.ai
desc: Meeting transcription and notes. Good free entry point for interview notetaking.

name: Pillar → Employ
desc: Interview intelligence with scorecard completion, interviewer coaching, and first-year attrition tracking. Acquired by Employ in 2025; now integrated into Lever/Jobvite/JazzHR ecosystem.

name: Screenloop
desc: AI-native hiring intelligence platform. Interview capture, structured feedback, bias reduction, recruiter analytics, and funnel optimization in one.

name: BarRaiser
desc: AI-powered interview intelligence + structured interview training. Focuses on consistency and bias reduction across hiring panels.

name: CodeInterview
desc: Browser-based live coding interviews. Lightweight collaborative IDE for take-homes and pair-programming screens.

name: CoderPad
desc: Real-time collaborative coding interviews in 40+ languages. The go-to live-coding tool for engineering panels.

name: CodeSignal
desc: Skills-based technical assessments + live interviewing. Standardized scoring, strong anti-cheating, popular for engineering at scale.

name: Codility
desc: Technical coding assessments with detailed skill reporting.

name: HackerRank
desc: Coding challenges and assessments. Free tier available.

name: Karat
desc: Human-led, AI-enabled technical interviews as a service. Standardizes engineering interviews. "NextGen Interviews" launched December 2025. Used by Meta, Lyft, and others to reduce interviewer burden.

name: Calendly
desc: Scheduling tool. Share link, candidates pick a time. Free tier works for most individual recruiters.

name: GoodTime
desc: AI-powered interview scheduling. Automates up to 90% of coordination. Panel scheduling, interviewer load balancing, self-booking, reminders via email/SMS/WhatsApp.

name: Loom
desc: Screen + webcam recording. Async video comms and candidate outreach.

name: ModernLoop
desc: Interview scheduling and coordination for complex panels. Load balancing, interviewer training tracking, and ATS sync.

name: Prelude (Calendly)
desc: Recruiting-specific scheduling: round-robin assignment, panel coordination, and native Greenhouse connectivity. Acquired by Calendly.

name: Spark Hire
desc: One-way and live video interviews.

name: Vidyard
desc: Personalized video for outreach and screening.

name: Awesome Interview Questions (GitHub)
desc: Repo with interview guides for devs.

name: SkillSurvey (now iCIMS)
desc: Automated reference checks with benchmarking. Acquired by iCIMS.

name: Workable Interview Question Templates
desc: 500+ interview question templates by role.

name: Xref Template Builder
desc: Free reference check question template builder.

name: Zinc Reference Generator
desc: Free culture-fit reference question generator.

name: Apify
desc: Web scraping + automation platform. 1500+ pre-built actors.

name: Bardeen
desc: Browser automation for repetitive sourcing tasks.

name: Browse AI
desc: No-code scraper that extracts structured data from web pages on a schedule. Good for lightweight monitoring and list extraction into sheets.

name: Captain Data
desc: No-code data extraction + enrichment across LinkedIn and 100+ sources. Chain scraping, enrichment, and CRM push into automated workflows.

name: Clay
desc: Data enrichment + workflow automation hub. Pulls from 50+ sources. Best in class.

name: Instant Data Scraper
desc: Chrome extension to scrape tables from any webpage.

name: Make
desc: Visual workflow automation. Great for recruiting ops.

name: n8n
desc: Open-source workflow automation. Self-hostable.

name: Phantombuster
desc: Automation agents for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram.

name: Scrapy
desc: Python web scraping framework.

name: Zapier
desc: App automation. Connect ATS, Slack, email, sheets.

name: ChatGPT
